eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 06:48 AM ON MAR 27, 2026 Effective until 07:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: RED FLAG WARNING in effect until 8 pm. Persistent dry conditions, high winds, low humidity. Conditions will persist through the weekend. Outdoor burning is not advised.
